intro.p1: A heating pump is the heart of your central heating system, ensuring even heat distribution throughout your home. Grundfos heating pumps are renowned for their reliability and energy efficiency — the MAGNA3 and ALPHA3 series have repeatedly been recognized by Estonian professionals as the best choice for private homes and commercial buildings. A high-quality circulation pump for heating maintains the system quietly and efficiently, reducing heating costs by up to 20% compared to older pumps.
intro.p2: In the Estonian climate, a heating pump is an indispensable solution for both new energy-efficient homes and renovated buildings. The MAGNA3 is suitable for larger systems with balanced systems, while the more compact ALPHA3 is ideal for smaller apartments and small houses. Quiet operation ensures the pump doesn't disturb living spaces — it can even be installed near the living room. Energy savings are a key argument: smart pumps automatically adjust their operation to the system's needs.
intro.p3: iPumps is the official Grundfos distributor in Estonia — this means original warranty, professional consultation, and fast delivery. All popular heating pumps are available in our warehouse now, with delivery across Estonia taking 1–2 business days. We also offer installation services including system balancing. Choose the right heating pump from our catalog below and make your home more energy-efficient today!

intro.p1: A cooling pump is the foundation of any chilled water system, ensuring stable cooling circulation in both industrial and domestic systems. Grundfos cooling circulation pumps are built to operate continuously and reliably even under extreme temperatures — whether for cold rooms, air conditioning systems, or industrial lines. A high-quality cooling pump prevents system overheating and ensures optimal temperature throughout the entire process.
intro.p2: In Estonian commercial spaces and production facilities, efficient cooling circulation is essential — especially in summer when temperatures rise. The Grundfos TP and TPE series are designed specifically for industrial cooling systems, delivering high performance and energy savings. Quiet operation is also important in business premises where noise can disturb employees. A balanced system ensures that chilled water is distributed evenly to all cooling equipment.
intro.p3: iPumps provides professional consultation and fast delivery for all cooling pumps. Over the years, we have supplied hundreds of Estonian businesses with reliable cooling solutions. A wide range of medium and high-power pumps is available in stock. Choose the right cooling pump from our catalog below and enhance your system's reliability today!

intro.h2: Grundfos Hot Water Circulation Pump — Professional Choice
intro.p1: A hot water circulation pump ensures that hot water reaches your tap quickly and without waste. The COMFORT series is designed specifically for households — the pump starts automatically when water is used and shuts off when it isn't. This significantly reduces water consumption and energy bills compared to systems where water must flow through long pipe runs before getting warm.
intro.p2: For Estonian families, quick availability of hot water is an important convenience — especially for larger families where morning showers and dishwashing can overlap. A hot water circulation system keeps water at a suitable temperature throughout the house at all times, avoiding waiting and wasted water. Energy savings of up to 15% compared to traditional systems is a real result that COMFORT pumps are designed to deliver.
intro.p3: iPumps is your reliable partner in selecting hot water pumps. We offer free consultation to choose the right model, taking into account your home's specifics and pipe length. COMFORT and other popular models are available in our warehouse now. Choose the right hot water circulation pump from our catalog below and enjoy convenient hot water throughout your home!

intro.p1: A borewell pump is the solution when you need independent water supply for your household or business. The Grundfos SQ and SP series are the world's leading deep-well pumps, capable of lifting water from depths of up to 200 meters — whether for a small family or a large agricultural enterprise. A drinking water pump must meet high standards, and Grundfos products are certified as safe for drinking water.
intro.p2: In Estonia's rural areas and suburbs, borewells remain a common solution — reducing dependence on the public water network and offering an economical alternative. The SQ series is known for its intelligent control: built-in protection against dry running and the ability to connect to solar power. SP pumps are reliable in industrial applications where high flow rates and constant pressure are needed.
intro.p3: iPumps offers a complete service: we advise on selecting the right borewell pump, provide professional installation, and are always available for maintenance questions. A wide range of SQ and SP pumps is in stock, with fast delivery across Estonia. Choose the right borewell pump from our catalog below and create independent water supply for your household today!

intro.p1: A drainage pump protects your home and buildings from flooding — whether it's pumping out basements, draining rainwater, or drying out construction sites. The Grundfos Unilift series is designed to handle both clean and partially dirty water situations. The compact construction and multiple installation options make these pumps ideal for both residential homes and commercial buildings.
intro.p2: In the Estonian climate, drainage is especially important — spring snowmelt and heavy rains can cause flooding in basements and foundations. The Unilift CC and Unilift KP pumps are equipped with a float switch that automatically starts the pump when the water level rises and shuts it off when the water is drained. A basement pump is essential for any building with below-ground floors.
intro.p3: iPumps offers a wide selection of drainage pumps for every purpose — from compact household models to industrial drainage pumps. We also assist with special solutions, such as emptying wells or protecting critical areas. Choose the right drainage pump from our catalog below and protect your home from flooding today!

intro.p1: A well pump is ideal for households with groundwater access where a borewell cannot be drilled. The Grundfos JP series is known as powerful and durable surface pumps that operate automatically and quietly. A water automatics unit is a smart solution that starts the pump when needed and shuts it off when water is not in use — saving energy and extending the pump's lifespan.
intro.p2: In Estonia's smaller villages and summer cottage areas, wells remain a popular water source. The JP series provides stable pressure and sufficient power for family home water supply — suitable for both drinking and household use. Quiet operation is important when the pump is located near living spaces or inside the house.
intro.p3: iPumps is your reliable partner in selecting well pumps. We offer professional advice on how to approach installation and which pump suits your well depth and needs. Our contract installation service ensures everything works flawlessly. Choose the right well pump from our catalog below and stop worrying about water supply today!

intro.h2: Grundfos Pressure Boosting Pump — Professional Choice
intro.p1: A pressure boosting pump increases water pressure where it's naturally lacking — this is the solution for older buildings, upper floors, or situations where the flow is too weak. The Grundfos CM and CMBE series are compact and reliable pumps suitable for both domestic use and commercial applications. Boosting water pressure is important not only for comfort but also for the proper functioning of appliances like dishwashers and showers.
intro.p2: In Estonia's older apartment buildings and houses, weak water pressure is often a problem — especially during peak hours when multiple families use water at the same time. The CMBE series is equipped with an integrated inverter that automatically adjusts pressure according to demand, ensuring stable pressure throughout the system. Energy savings of up to 30% compared to traditional pumps is a real result.
intro.p3: iPumps offers a complete service for selecting and installing pressure boosting pumps. We assist with systems for both small apartments and large commercial buildings. We advise on which pump suits your situation and water supply specifics. Choose the right pressure boosting pump from our catalog below and enjoy strong water pressure at every tap today!

intro.p1: A sewage pump is an essential device wherever drainage cannot flow by gravity — whether it's a basement WC, a below-grade septic tank, or a kitchen drain in a deeper pipe system. The Grundfos Sololift series are compact and reliable sewage pumps designed specifically for domestic use. They can lift wastewater up to 8 meters high and 100 meters away.
intro.p2: In Estonia's older apartment buildings and renovated homes, sewage pumping is often needed — for example, when bathrooms are built below the main drain or the WC is located below the sewer line. The Sololift 2 is the latest version with improved hygiene features and quieter operation. Septic tank pumping requires a stronger pump — the SOLAR and MULTILIFT series are suitable for this.
intro.p3: iPumps offers professional consultation on selecting sewage pumps. We assist with drainage systems for both small apartments and large private homes. Our specialists advise you on the right model and installation solution. Choose the right sewage pump from our catalog below and forget about drainage worries today!
